```json
[
  {
    "idea": "EV Charger Expansion Frenzy",

      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Charger deployment is steady and accelerates seasonally in spring; 2% weekly growth threshold fires multiple times per quarter."
  },

    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
```
